title: Ivory Tower: Semi-Supervised Citation Sorting
strategies: majority-class predictor: label every unlabeled paper with the most frequent seed subfield (reproduces the evaluator's weak reference, ~0.1)
feature-only nearest-centroid: build per-class centroids from the labeled seeds' topic vectors and assign each query paper to the closest centroid, ignoring citations
feature-primed label propagation: spread the clamped seed labels along citation edges, blending neighbour aggregation with the feature-centroid prior, then argmax -- exploits homophily plus features

richer semi-supervised schemes: personalized-PageRank / harmonic-function propagation, degree-normalized aggregation, feature-kNN graph augmentation, or confidence-weighted self-training to push accuracy further
